reviews.title: Total best!
reviews.text: That this is my fourth in a row kayano 28 oughta tell ya something!!!

reviews.title: Asics has changed
reviews.text: I have been wearing Asics Gel Kayano running shoes  for many years.  This is the first time I have had a complaint.  They are no sized correctly.  Every time I wear them my back hurts.  When I put them up against the pair I am replacing the new ones are not the same size.  I missed the return period because I kept thinking they would be okay.  As it is I have 2 pair of shoes that I spent over $200 on and cannot wear them.

reviews.title: Great for wide and flat feet
reviews.text: Got these for my son who has a wide/flat foot. He said these are so comfortable. He’s on his feet for most of the day and said his back pain has decreased since wearing these too.

reviews.title: Rubbed my Achilles raw

No padding or lining to protect your heels/Achilles and we worry socks. Perhaps ok if you are only going to be walking. However, we hike and hike mountains that are 7,000+ Ft. Great for earthing, building neuro pathways and feedback in feet.

reviews.title: Waited a year of use before my review
reviews.text: To be honest I only bought these shoes from the way they looked (Camo) and only after watching a few viedeos on them.. the price is great.. the comfort is surprising and easy to wear. I weith right at 300 lbs and they support me just fine.. now know I also own Brooks, NB, Adidas, UA HOVR, etc... shoes as well.. are these as comfortable as they are.. No.. but they sure pack a punch bang for the buck thought.. NOW.. One huge issue.;. and again I wanted to wait and see if the soles "scuffed up: for traction.. but no.. If there is rain.. and the water on any surface is thin.. like tile, ocncrete, wood or anything besices most asphalt.. this shoe is like your walking on thin ice.. and YOU WILL SKID! Be warned.. Good.. but Dry use ONLY

reviews.title: Don't quite fit... 3 is too small & 13 is too big.
reviews.text:
I ordered Size 3 for my daughter who just grew out of 2s. They are tight, heavy and smaller than another 3 we have.

I ordered size 13 for my son who just outgrew size 12. They are very large and larger than other 13s we have.

Both kids said they are too heavy and stiff. They seem like good quality shoes but I can understand the kids' opinion. We are returning both and will try the running shoes with the mesh instead.

reviews.title: Takes A Beating
reviews.text: Purchased these sneakers for our seven year old son. He is very rough on his shoes and I am very surprised how well these sneakers are holding up. He says they are very comfortable and choices to wear them every day.

reviews.title: daughter loves these
reviews.text: We like these because they are cute, fit well and are mostly waterproof. They are a little bulky but daughter doesn't seem to mind. So far have held up for most of the year (kids run through their shoes pretty quickly usually).

reviews.title: Cute but not amazing quality.
reviews.text: These sneakers are fine since little guys grow out of their shoes fairly quickly.  He's had better quality shoes, but still these are pretty nice and are holding up reasonably well.

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Roav V1 Running Shoe
description: The impressive New Balance Fresh Foam Roav running shoes are loaded with built-in technology to make your day more enjoyable. The midsole features Fresh Foam cushioning which provides a feeling of plush comfort while remaining lightweight. NDurance technology makes the rubber outsole more durable so you can wear these shoes whether you're strutting on the sidewalk or jogging off-road. Finally, the Ultra Heel is strategically-designed to hug the back of your foot for a more supportive fit. These workout shoes are designed with your comfort in mind. The neutral cushioned running shoes hug your foot in its natural position to provide a lightly supported ride. Each element of the shoe's design is thoughtfully selected to ensure your feet are happy after daily wear. Made with a synthetic/mesh upper, these athletic shoes offer effortless wear and style. The bootie construction allows for easy on-and-off, while the stretch webbing offers even more comfort and a customized fit. These breathable shoes are here to support you through each stride, lift, squat or stretch. Weather you're exploring the city, hitting the gym or running a quick mile, opt for a shoe that keeps your foot supported while providing a cloud-like ride.
features: 100% Mesh
Imported
Rubber sole

Truly Unique: The New Balance Fresh Foam Roav v1 running shoes are the ultimate in casual athletic style. Pairing a bold, attractive look with plush comfort, these cushioned running shoes are in a league of their own.

Fresh Foam Midsole: Feel like you're running or walking in the clouds. The first of three proprietary technologies in this athletic shoe, Fresh Foam midsole cushioning is precision engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride.

NDurance Outsole: Step up your game without wearing out your favorite running shoes. Ndurance rubber outsole technology provides superior durability in high-wear areas to help get more out of the shoes.

Ultra Heel: These neutral running shoes boast a head-turning heel that performs as well as it looks. The Ultra Heel design hugs the back of the foot for a snug, supportive fit. This unique heel works alongside the bootie upper for all-day comfort.
8mm Drop: These lightweight shoes feature a heel-to-toe drop of approximately 8mm. Due to variances created during development and manufacturing processes, references to 8mm are approximate.

reviews.title: Beyond comfortable
reviews.text: I love everything about these shoes. I bought them as a walking shoe to wear during our cruise. I actually wore them during our stop in San Juan. We walked over 25,000 steps in San Juan on a self walking tour and these were beyond comfortable. My feet felt great all day wearing them, I never had a problem with them pinching or rubbing my heels. New balance makes some of the best running shoes (in my opinion) and these Roav's did not disappoint. I will be buying additional pairs in other colors.

reviews.title: Satisfied customer!

title: ASICS Men's Gel-Venture 7 Running Shoes
description: Take on the toughest terrain in confidence with the men's GEL-VENTURE 7 performance trail running shoe by ASICS. Featuring GEL technology and an EVA midsole, this shoe is made for athletes who love to run in the great outdoors. GEL technology in the rearfoot area of the shoe provides shock absorption where you need it most, while the ORTHOLITE sockliner provides an additional layer of cushioning underfoot. It even molds to the shape of your feet, making each run even more comfortable than the last. Extra support comes from the sturdy upper crafted from synthetic leather, while the internal heel counter gently helps your foot remain in its natural line of motion, making for a more efficient stride. Meanwhile the EVA midsole protects your feet against impact and increases rebound, giving you an energetic feeling as you clock up the miles. Durable and practical, the GEL-VENTURE 7 shoe makes an excellent training partner whether you're new to trail running or a seasoned pro.
features: Synthetic-and-mesh
Imported
Ethylene Vinyl Acetate sole

Ortholite X-40 Sockliner: This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC.)
Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.

Ortholite X-40 Sockliner: This premium sockliner features higher rebound properties while providing excellent moisture management and a high-level of breathability (Ortholite is a registered trademark of O2 Partners LLC.)
Rearfoot GEL technology cushioning system: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.
Trail Specific Outsole: Reversed lugs provide uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrain.

reviews.title: Great for disc golf
reviews.text: Image is my second attempt at patching a massive toe hole. Probably should just buy a new pair... These lasted through 4 months of pretty intense disc golf. All told, probably 350 miles of running on trails, through creeks and mud, etc. Not to mention repeated torsion on the fabric in a way it wasn't designed for. Through it all, these have dried quickly and remained comfortable. Not bad for $50, would buy again.

reviews.title: 13W - Wide toe box

My existing pair has aged well, and after much wear, it has developed a tear in the inside lining near the heel.

reviews.title: Not peach colored
reviews.text:
First off, I thought these were a peach color...WRONG. Very bright! Since I will be using them for working out, it's not that big of deal.
Secondly, they feel on the smaller side. I always wear an 8 1/2 in Nike, but then seem a little snug. I loosened the laces and wore them around the house and I guess I will get use to them.
Definately not my favorite pair of shoes, but I hate the hassle of returning in stuff, so will keep them and see how it goes.

reviews.title: Love these shoes!

reviews.title: Sizing is WAY OFF!
reviews.text: Love the shoe but OMG the sizing is WAY OFF! I have ordered this shoe four times consecutively and each time they run SUPER SMALL. My 10 year old daughter wears a 6.5 and I have had to order a 9 after ordering a 7, 7.5 and an 8.5 and none of those fit her. I will update my review once the 9’s come in. We order shoes every 4-6 months and she loves Nikes but these are made in Vietnam versus her last pair made in India and the sizing couldn’t be more off! See photos!

title: Saucony Men's Redeemer ISO Road Running Shoe
description:
High stability road running shoe, accomidates orthotics & overpronation
Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.

title: Saucony Women's Kinvara 13 Running Shoe
description: When it comes to lightweight speed, nothing crushes the competition like the Kinvara. And this just so happens to be our lightest one yet. With more speed contouring and its signature flexible feel, it pushes you forward without holding anything back. These are the shoes you’ll do big things in.
features: Rubber sole
The Kinvara 13 was literally designed for speed. Its beveled midsole and new midfoot contouring deliver a smoother, faster ride.
Its re-imagined upper is made with a single-layer mesh, giving you a lightweight feeling and even more breathability.
We created the lightest Kinvara ever to help you truly take off. It’s 7.2 ounces of pure speed.

reviews.title: Light, neutral shoe
reviews.text: Saucony neutral running shoes are the only kind of running shoes that I have ever purchased. I had accepted that my feet can only tolerate running if I’m wearing the ugliest, clunkiest shoes. That’s changed with this pair. They are so lightweight and look nothing like my other pairs. I usually have to lace up my shoes differently, but haven’t had to do that with these. They’re so lightweight, but provide all of the support that I need

reviews.title: Get 1/2 size larger. I wear 8 1/2 purchased 9.
reviews.text: Comfortable and lightweight. Great color.

reviews.title: Lightweight and breathable
reviews.text:
Pros:
-Overall these shoes are pretty lightweight and breathable. Good amount of air flow with the mesh siding, however you need to take good care of these as the mesh can rip easier when you catch your foot on a step.
-I am a huge fan of saucony and have never had bad results with any of their shoes over the past 20 years. These shoes appear to be more of a basic model that I would expect to last about a year or 1 marathon season.
-No issues with blisters or rubbing.

Cons:
-There isn’t much grip/tread on the bottom of these shoes. For this reason, I don’t expect these to hold up as well as some of the other models of Saucony shoes I’ve had in the past.

reviews.title: True Fit
reviews.text: I have been wearing Saucony shoes for a few years now. They're one of the few shoe brands that I can order without trying on first. I can count on their shoes being true fit. This pair is no exception. I have wide feet and it's hard to find shoes that fit period! Let alone being able to order them online. These are running shoes and I am not a runner. I do find them to be less cushiony than I am used to. Maybe it's because they are running shoes. They are still comfortable to wear. I like the black and silver colors.

title: ASICS Women's GT-2000 5 Running Shoes
description:
For the higher mileage runner looking for structured cushioning and support, the GT-2000 5 shoe features a FluidRide® midsole for exceptional bounce-back and cushioning. An added stitch-down toecap enhances durability and forefoot support.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Mesh/Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
I.G.S (Impact Guidance System) Technology: ASICS design philosophy that employs linked componentry to enhance the foot's natural gait from heel strike to toe-off.
Dynamic DuoMax Support System: This evolution of DuoMax system enhances stability and support, with reduced weight and increased platform support.
Rearfoot and Forefoot GEL Cushioning Systems: Attenuates shock during impact and toe-off phases, and allows movement in multiple planes as the foot transitions through the gait cycle.
FluidRide Midsole: FluidRide provides the ultimate combination of bounce back and cushioning properties with reduced weight and exceptional durability.
Guidance Trusstic System Technology: This Trusstic System integrates Guidance Line construction for enhanced gait efficiency while providing midfoot structural integrity.

title: New Balance Women's Fresh Foam Arishi Trail V1 Trail Running Shoe
description: Hit the trails in comfort and style with the Fresh Foam Arishi Trail running shoes from New Balance. These comfortable running shoes are built tough with performance features designed to help keep your feet safe and supported. Toe Protect technology helps shield your feet from rocks, roots and debris as you tackle new terrain, and a durable AT Tread dual lug outsole provides versatile traction for both on- and off-road adventures. These trail shoes are crafted with textile and synthetic uppers that feature classic New Balance branding for a fresh, sporty look. No-sew upper construction adds to the sleek fit and feel that you'd expect from these lightweight running shoes. Underfoot, you’re treated to super soft comfort with Fresh Foam midsole technology that is precision-engineered to deliver an ultra-cushioned, lightweight ride. An EVA foam insert adds even more cushioned comfort to help fuel your runs. Wherever your trail takes you, arrive in comfort with these sleek, stylish and supportive running shoes.
features: Imported

GORE-TEX waterproof fabric protects feet from wind, rain and water without sacrificing breathability
AT Tread outsole provides versatile traction during both on and off-road activities
Toe Protect technology helps protect feet from rocks, roots and debris
Upper features no-sew construction for a sleek fit and feel

title: New Balance Men's FuelCore Coast V4 Running Shoe
description:
Whether you're running at the gym or wearing on the streets, the new fuel core coast V4 unites convenience and comfort for the ultimate everyday athletic shoe. The ground contact eva outsole creates a lightweight ride while bootie construction has a second-skin feel and is easy to slip on and go.
New Balance, is dedicated to helping athletes achieve their goals. It's been their mission for more than a century. It's why they don't spend money on celebrity endorsements. They spend it on research and development. It's why they don't design products to fit an image. They design them to fit. New Balance is driven to make the finest shoes for the same reason athletes lace them up: to achieve the very best.

reviews.title: Love them!
reviews.text: Light weight with a great fit. Perfect for travel or day to day wear.  They handled a solid day of walking around city streets in comfort.  I’m ordering another pair in a different color.

reviews.title: Super Light weight
reviews.text: The style, color and the lightweight of the material and sole make a perfect shoe. We will see in time if they stand up to my husbands daily regime at the gym.

reviews.title: Great running and walking shoe
reviews.text: Wonderful product, fit perfectly, wash in washing machine NOT HOT WATER, warm or cold so glued parts do not come apart. They wash many, many times with no ill effects.

reviews.title: a lite duty general purpose shoe
reviews.text:
I hd to send back my normal size, a 9EEE, for a size larger. I've had this variation in size before with New Balance so beware. I'm still giving it 5 stars for style and price.

You may have noticed that price varies considerably with the color sub/style you choose. Mine were only $21 while others are substantially more. I assume construction is the same on all of them? Maybe the price is based on the current inventory? My price dropped slightly after I ordered.

While it is sold as a running shoe (?) and is probably adequate for this purpose a serious high mileage runner would probably pay more to get more. If you can get the right price point as I did they are certainly worth a try as a general purpose/athletic/walking shoe.

reviews.title: Very nice

title: Brooks Women's Glycerin GTS 20 Supportive Running Shoe
features: Made in the USA or Imported
manmade sole

THIS WOMEN'S SHOE IS FOR: The Glycerin GTS 20 is perfect for runners who think there is no such thing as too much cushioning and but require additional support from our trusted GuideRails which offer innovative technology to help guide your body in its natural path of motion while keeping excess movement in check. Predecessor: Brooks Glycerin GTS 19. This Brooks Glycerin GTS 20 is a certified PDAC A5500 Diabetic shoe and has been granted the APMA Seal of Acceptance.

GREAT SUPPORT: The Glycerin GTS 20 is the more supportive version of the Glycerin 20. With its integrated GuideRails holistic support system, excess movement is kept in check to keep you moving comfortably while providing additional support beyond just the feet, to the most injury-prone part of a runner’s body: the knees.
MAXIMUM CUSHION AND SUPPORT: Provides maximum support while offering the maximum amount of cushioning. Ideal for road running, cross training, the gym or wherever you might want to take them!

SUPREME SOFTNESS: The ultimate in softness and supreme comfort, designed for runners who want pillowy soft cushioning. The Glycerin 20 with DNA LOFT v3 offers our softest cushioning optimized to be lightweight, responsive, and durable.
SMOOTH TRANSITIONS: New cushioning and redesigned outsole deliver smoother and more stable transitions for a supremely soft on-the-run experience that lets runners fully immerse in their miles.

reviews.title: Great support

I hope brooks will not mess with this because it’s perfect. They ruined Adrenalines with the 22, which became uncomfortable this year.

Perfect for run, walk, work, weight training, park, boating, cycling jogging, garden, lawn, equestrian, basketball, rowing, athletics, tennis, volleyball, football, driving and yoga. Casual daily shoes which can bring more enjoy to your life.

reviews.title: durable and comfortable
reviews.text: OK, so I was not expecting these to be comfortable for my 12.5hr shifts, nor was I expecting them to be durable. Surprise!! They are both. I am a nurse, enough said about comfort. I got poop on them, washed them in my washing machine, expecting to remove tattered and torn, I found them clean and INTACT!!!!! The color is just as bright as the day I  bought them. My coworkers are spending $150 or more on HOKA and I got these cheeeeap!! I love them!!!! Plus, when it rains they don't squeak????? I was so surprised, I don't know what to say about that. The heel is see thru and there isn't even any water inside after washing them. Sized very accurate, if anything they were 1/2 inch longer than expected. I wear a 7.5 in womens U.S. and these are not tight AT ALL, if I had gotten an 8, which I normally do when buying online and especially foreign, I would have been in trouble. Get them! I am getting another color as soon as I finish typing.

title: ASICS Mens Gel-Venture 6 Running Shoe
description:
The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: Rubber sole
Outdoor-ready runner with mesh and brushstroke-patterned underlays
Rearfoot GEL cushioning
Removable sockliner accommodates medical orthotics
Trail-specific outsole with reversed traction lugs
AHAR outsole rubber in critical high-wear areas

reviews.title: Runs a tad large, order 1/2 size down.. still 5+ stars!!!!
reviews.text: I have bought New Balance 1260’s for years and I am always a size 10.  This shoe was too big as a 10 and I had to return for a 9.5.  That being said, I still give it 5 stars and would give more if I could!  These were by far the most comfortable, light weight, and best looking (better than the pic by far) New Balance I’ve ever owned. I ordered in another color the next day!  Love these shoes.

reviews.title: Great shoes though
reviews.text: Even though I ordered wide width they are a little more snug across the ball of my foot than my other new Balance shoes of the same size.  Great shoes though.  Very comfortable and lightweight.  Love the color too!

reviews.title: These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit
reviews.text: Wow! I have 2 pair of the 1260v4 that are my absolute favs.  These v5's are even more comfortable and have a sleeker narrower fit. I love the color and the attention to details.

reviews.title: Very comfortable shoes!
reviews.text: I loved these shoes the first moment I put them on my feet.  They are so comfortable and provide so much support.  You really get your money's worth in these shoes.  They are like walking on clouds.  I walked in a 5K recently and they were amazing and my feet felt great afterwards. Highly recommend!

title: AUGSUN 110 Pieces 1/2 Inch Stainless Steel Track and Cross Country Spikes with Spike Wrench, Replacement Spikes for Sprint Sports Short Running Shoes
features: 【QUALITY MATERIAL】: Made of quality stainless steel, which is very sturdy, rust-resist and anti-corrode. Pyramid needle design, not damage track. Very practical items for both men and women.
【PACKAGE INCLUDES】: Package includes 110 pieces spikes with 1pcs spike wrench, convenient for you to replace your shoe spikes. There are enough quantity for your daily use.
【SIZE】: 1.27cm (1/2 inch) in length, tapered and needle-shaped, which increases friction between the sole and the ground and prevents skidding.

【EASY TO USE & REPLACE SPIKES】: The package includes a spike wrench. It is very easy for you to screw the track spikes into the shoes, convenient to replace the spikes. Ideal for athletic tracks, field and cross country surfaces.

【PROVIDE GREAT DRIP FOR SPORTSMAN】: The spike pins can increase the friction between the shoe sole and ground, resist skid and improve your running balance of traction, flexibility and speed for track sprints, long jump, running.

description:
The GEL-Venture 5 provides great fit and everyday comfort, with Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System and a rugged outsole ideal for a variety of terrains.
In 1949, Mr. Kihachiro Onitsuka began his athletic footwear company (Onitsuka Co., Ltd.) by manufacturing basketball shoes out of his living room in Kobe, Japan. He chose the name ASICS for his company in 1977, based on a famous Latin phrase "Anima Sana In Corpore Sano," which, when translated, expresses the ancient ideal of "A Sound Mind in a Sound Body." Taking the acronym of this phrase, ASICS was founded on the belief that the best way to create a healthy and happy lifestyle is to promote total health and fitness. Today, ASICS offers a full line of performance-driven athletic shoes and technical active sports apparel and accessories dedicated to bringing harmony to the body and soul.
features: 100% Synthetic
Imported
Rubber sole
Rearfoot GEL Cushioning System: Attenuates shock during impact phase and allows for a smooth transition to midstance.
Removable Sockliner: A sockliner which can be removed to accommodate a medical orthotic.
Trail Specific Outsole: Reversed lugs provide uphill and downhill traction on all types of terrain.
AHAR Outsole: Acronym for ASICS High Abrasion Rubber. Placed in critical areas of the outsole for exceptional durability.

title: Saucony Unisex-Adult Women's Kineta Relay Running Shoe
description:
The Kineta relay goes along for the ride and never complains. With breathable, lightweight construction and a modern look, it’s a durable and comfortable shoe for whatever the day brings you.
Saucony is among the most respected names in running shoes. We offer a wide range of running and walking shoes, each with the Saucony trademark fit, feel and performance. We've spent years studying the biomechanics of top athletes. Our goal? To develop creatively engineered systems that maximize your performance in your specific activity, allowing you to focus on the activity instead of the equipment. From our studies have come many innovative Saucony concepts. Advanced technologies-like Grid, the first sole-based stability and cushioning system--provide an advantage to athletes of all types.
